batch_planning.why: Stress profile keeps planner stable so failures isolate prose/edit quality behavior.

batch_prose.why: Deliberately weaker prose primary to validate retry-driven model escalation to stronger fallbacks.

batch_editing.why: Editing starts conservative and can rotate under repeated quality failures.

repair_json.why: Preserves strict JSON repair reliability for deterministic contract checks.

coherence_check.why: Long-context coherence checker remains independent from prose role and supports escalation tests.
